metadata.description: AKS system node pool VM size
Rate limit threshold (requests per minute per IP)
Resource ID of the AKS internal load balancer frontend IP config. Set after deploying K8s services with internal LB annotation. Leave empty for initial deployment.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Customer ID (workspace ID) for agent configuration
Bastion subnet address prefix (must be named AzureBastionSubnet)
Resource ID of the APIM subnet
Resource ID of the AKS subnet
Resource ID of the Private Endpoints subnet
Resource ID of the Bastion subnet
Resource ID of the VNet to link DNS zones to
Resource ID of the APIM private DNS zone
Resource ID of the Key Vault private DNS zone
Resource ID of the AKS private DNS zone
Tenant ID for Key Vault access policies
Object ID of the APIM managed identity (for certificate access)
Resource ID of the Key Vault
Resource ID of the AKS subnet
VM size for the system node pool
Number of nodes in the system node pool
Log Analytics workspace resource ID for monitoring
DNS prefix for the AKS cluster
Resource ID of the AKS cluster
AKS FQDN for the private cluster
Resource ID of the AKS subnet (where the internal LB frontend lives)

Resource ID of the internal load balancer frontend IP configuration. Obtain this from the AKS-managed internal LB in the node resource group after deploying services with azure-load-balancer-internal annotation.
Resource ID of the Private Link Service
Name of the Private Link Service
Alias of the Private Link Service (used in PE connections)
Log Analytics workspace resource ID for diagnostics
Resource ID of the APIM service
Private IP addresses of APIM when VNet-integrated; empty when using Private Endpoint-only connectivity
Resource ID of the APIM service
Resource ID of the subnet for private endpoints
Resource ID of the APIM private DNS zone
Resource ID of the APIM private endpoint
Name of the APIM private endpoint
Network interface IDs of the private endpoint
Tenant ID for Key Vault access policies
Object ID of the APIM managed identity (for certificate access)
Resource ID of the Key Vault
WAF mode: Prevention blocks, Detection only logs
Rate limit threshold — max requests per source IP in the time window
Azure Front Door ID for header validation (defense-in-depth). Pass empty string on initial deploy; redeploy with actual ID after AFD is created.

customBlockResponseBody.defaultValue:
[base64('Blocked

Request Blocked

Your request has been blocked by our security policy. If you believe this is an error, contact support with your request ID.

')]

customRules.rules: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'RateLimitPerSourceIP', 'priority', 100, 'enabledState', 'Enabled', 'ruleType', 'RateLimitRule', 'rateLimitDurationInMinutes', parameters('rateLimitDurationInMinutes'), 'rateLimitThreshold', parameters('rateLimitThreshold'), 'action', 'Block', 'matchConditions', createArray(createObject('matchVariable', 'RemoteAddr', 'operator', 'IPMatch', 'negateCondition', false(), 'matchValue', createArray('0.0.0.0/0'))))), if(empty(parameters('afdProfileId')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'BlockMissingAzureFDID', 'priority', 200, 'enabledState', 'Enabled', 'ruleType', 'MatchRule', 'action', 'Block', 'matchConditions', createArray(createObject('matchVariable', 'RequestHeader', 'selector', 'X-Azure-FDID', 'operator', 'Equal', 'negateCondition', true(), 'matchValue', createArray(parameters('afdProfileId')), 'transforms', createArray('Lowercase')))))))]

metadata.description: AFD Premium WAF Policy — Prevention mode with DRS 2.1 + Bot Manager + custom rules
Resource ID of the WAF policy — reference this from AFD security policy
Resource ID of the WAF policy to associate
Resource ID of the Private Link Service for APIM PE (used in origin private link config)

sharedPrivateLinkResource.requestMessage: AFD Private Link connection to APIM

metadata.description: Resource ID of the AFD profile
AFD profile ID (for X-Azure-FDID header validation)
Name of the existing APIM service
Azure Front Door profile ID (GUID) for X-Azure-FDID header validation

variables.policyXml:
[replace('<policies>
  <inbound>
    <check-header name="X-Azure-FDID" failed-check-httpcode="403" failed-check-error-message="Access denied - request must arrive through Azure Front Door." ignore-case="true">
      <value>__FDID__</value>
    </check-header>
  </inbound>
  <backend />
  <outbound />
  <on-error />
</policies>', '__FDID__', parameters('frontDoorId'))]

metadata.description: AFD endpoint URL — use this to test the full path
AFD Front Door ID — used for X-Azure-FDID header validation on APIM

postDeployNote.value: IMPORTANT: The CD pipeline auto-approves the AFD Private Endpoint connection on APIM. If you deploy outside the pipeline, approve it manually. Deploy K8s services with internal LB annotation, then re-deploy with aksLoadBalancerFrontendIpConfigId set.
